About Me

Motivated. Curious.
Mission-ready.

I'm a motivated Aeronautical Engineering undergraduate at Acharya Institute of Technology, Bangalore, with a deep passion for space exploration, human spaceflight, and the multidisciplinary challenges of operating in demanding environments.

My academic foundation in flight mechanics, aerodynamics, control systems, and engineering mathematics gives me the technical backbone to tackle complex aerospace challenges. But I believe great missions aren't built on technical knowledge alone — they require human factors, psychological resilience, and exceptional teamwork.

From designing drone prototypes at the Smart India Hackathon to building and flying RC aircraft, I've consistently combined hands-on engineering with collaborative problem-solving. I'm comfortable contributing as a team member while also taking initiative when needed.

I am currently applying for the Asclepios VII Analogue Astronaut Mission (Summer 2027) and am fully available for regular online training and mission activities.

Projects

Work that takes flight

Academic research, team challenges, and engineering builds.

🏏
Research · 5th Semester
Oblique Impact of Viscoelastic Body on Rough Surface

Experimental study on sliding-to-rolling transition during rebound. Investigated incidence angle & surface roughness effects. Applications to aircraft tire touchdown behavior and mechanical collisions.

Physics & MechanicsExperimentalData Analysis
🚁
Team · Smart India Hackathon 2023–24
Agricultural Drone Prototype

Designed and tested a drone for apple orchard monitoring and spraying. Owned airframe design, payload optimization, and full system testing under hackathon conditions.

Drone DesignAgriTechSystems
✈️
Team · Acharya Institute
RC Aircraft Design & Flight

Built and successfully flew a radio-controlled aircraft from scratch. Contributed to aerodynamics, propulsion selection, and flight stability testing — achieving successful first flight.

AerodynamicsPropulsionBuild

Engineered a functional soapbox car for competitive racing. Applied mechanical design principles under tight time constraints with full team coordination.
